## 🚀 LAUNCH CHECKLIST (Next 7 Days)

### **BEFORE YOU START:**
- [ ] Open ENGAGEMENT_GIVEAWAY_CAMPAIGN.md
- [ ] Read Part 1 (Budget) + Part 3 (Lead Scoring) + Part 4 (Model)
- [ ] Write down the 3 lead quality factors (wedding urgency, no photographer, story detail)
- [ ] Memorize call script from TEMPLATES.md (page 2)

### **DAYS 1-2: SETUP**
- [ ] Create landing page ([copy from CAMPAIGN.md Part 4](ENGAGEMENT_GIVEAWAY_CAMPAIGN.md#part-4))
  - Value prop: "Free $2,500 engagement session OR 15% discount on your wedding"
  - Form fields: Name, phone, wedding date, story, photographer status
  - Mobile-optimized (test on phone)
- [ ] Copy 10 WhatsApp templates to your phone/notes ([link to TEMPLATES.md](GIVEAWAY_READY_TO_USE_TEMPLATES.md))
- [ ] Print/bookmark call script ([link to TEMPLATES.md call section](GIVEAWAY_READY_TO_USE_TEMPLATES.md#-call-script---15-minutes))
- [ ] Create lead tracking spreadsheet ([template in METRICS_DASHBOARD.md](GIVEAWAY_METRICS_DASHBOARD.md#part-4-lead-by-lead-tracking))
- [ ] Setup calendar link for call scheduling (Calendly or similar)

### **DAYS 3-4: TECHNICAL SETUP**
- [ ] Ask dev team: "Can we initialize GA4 + Meta Pixel for campaign tracking?" ([ANALYTICS_IMPLEMENTATION.md](ANALYTICS_IMPLEMENTATION.md))
- [ ] Create 2 ad creatives (video 15-30sec + static image)
  - Angle 1: "Before comparing photographers... book a free session first"
  - Angle 2: "Lock in your photographer + wedding photos at our early bird price"
- [ ] Setup Meta Ads campaign structure
  - $1,400 → Landing page ads (primary)
  - $400 → Retargeting website visitors
  - $200 → Testing new audiences

### **DAYS 5-6: LAUNCH**
- [ ] Turn on Meta Ads with $2,000 MXN daily budget
- [ ] Monitor: CPL target is < $18 MXN (watch daily)
- [ ] Create daily tracking sheet ([quick template here](GIVEAWAY_METRICS_DASHBOARD.md#part-2-daily-tracking-template))
- [ ] First leads arriving? → Send MSG 1 (Welcome) within 1 hour

### **DAY 7: REVIEW**
- [ ] How many leads so far? [__]
- [ ] CPL tracking at? $[__]
- [ ] Form completion rate at? [__]%
- [ ] Calls scheduled? [__]
- [ ] If CPL > $20 → Pause bottom 2 ads, refine audience

## 💰 BUDGET BREAKDOWN (Month 1)

```
Monthly Budget: $2,000 MXN

Allocation:
├─ Landing page ads (target cold audience): 70% = $1,400 MXN
├─ Retargeting (warm audience): 20% = $400 MXN
└─ Testing/new audiences: 10% = $200 MXN

Expected Results:
├─ Ad impressions: 6,500+
├─ Landing page visitors: 240+
├─ Lead submissions: 12-15
├─ Cost per lead: $133-167 MXN ($12-15 USD)
├─ Sessions booked: 3-4
├─ Wedding bookings: 1-2
└─ Campaign ROI: 500-1,400% (if 1 booking @ $10.5K)
```

---

## 📱 YOUR DAILY WORKFLOW (When Leads Start Coming)

### **MINUTE 1: Lead Submits Form**
→ They fill out landing page form (name, phone, wedding date, story)

### **MINUTES 1-5: You Get Alert**
→ You receive WhatsApp notification or Gmail alert
→ **IMMEDIATELY:** Open [TEMPLATES.md](GIVEAWAY_READY_TO_USE_TEMPLATES.md)
→ Copy MSG 1 (Welcome) 
→ Send within 1 hour (critical for conversion)

### **HOURS 1-4: Lead Response**
→ They respond to MSG 1 (usually within 2 hours if interested)
→ Copy [calendar link] from your Calendly
→ Send back: "Great! When works best this week? [LINK]"

### **HOURS 2-24: They Book Call**
→ They click calendar, pick a time
→ You get confirmation (from Calendly)
→ Send MSG 4 (Confirmation) same day

### **CALL DAY: 15-Minute Discovery Call**
→ Open [call script from TEMPLATES.md](GIVEAWAY_READY_TO_USE_TEMPLATES.md#-call-script---15-minutes)
→ Have their form in front of you
→ Follow script exactly (takes ~15 min)
→ They choose: Free session OR Early bird wedding package
→ Send MSG 6A or 6B confirming their choice

### **AFTER CALL: Next Steps**
→ If chose Free session: Book session date → Send MSG 5 → Send MSG 7 (post-session) → Send MSG 8 (wedding upsell)
→ If chose Early bird: Get booking deposit → Lock date → Done (they're a client!)

---

## 📊 WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

### **Week 1:**
- CPL: $14-18 MXN ✓
- First leads responded: Yes ✓
- First call scheduled: Yes ✓

### **Week 2-3:**
- 6-10 leads total
- 2-3 calls completed
- 1-2 sessions booked
- CPL trending down: $12-15 ✓

### **Week 4 (End of Month):**
- 12-15 leads total ✅ TARGET
- 3-4 sessions booked ✅ TARGET
- 1-2 wedding bookings ✅ TARGET
- Cost per lead: $12-15 MXN ✅ TARGET

### **If Month 1 Hits Targets:**
→ **SCALE:** Increase budget to $3,000 MXN Month 2
→ **RESULT:** 18-25 leads → 2-4 more wedding bookings
→ Month 2 revenue: $21K-42K additional wedding business

---

## ⚠️ RED FLAGS & FIXES

| Issue | Fix | Document |
|-------|-----|----------|
| **CPL jumps to $25+** | Pause bottom 2 ads, refine audience | [Decision rules here](GIVEAWAY_METRICS_DASHBOARD.md#if-this-happens--do-this) |
| **Form completion <3%** | Simplify form, add social proof, check mobile speed | [Form issues section](GIVEAWAY_METRICS_DASHBOARD.md#form-completion-issues) |
| **Leads don't respond** | Check message timing (9am-8pm best), ensure clear CTA | [Crisis texts](GIVEAWAY_READY_TO_USE_TEMPLATES.md#crisis-texts-when-things-go-wrong) |
| **Nobody books from free sessions** | Post-session follow-up within 12 hrs, increase discount | [Tracking section](GIVEAWAY_METRICS_DASHBOARD.md#session--wedding-conversion-tracking) |

---

## 🎯 3 THINGS TO REMEMBER

### **1. Lead Quality > Volume**
Not chasing 100 leads — chasing 15 GOOD leads.
Good lead = just engaged + no photographer + detailed story.
1 good lead → $10K wedding  
10 bad leads → $0

### **2. Speed Wins**
First message < 1 hour → 70% response rate  
First message < 24 hours → <20% response rate
Set phone reminders for lead responses.

### **3. Tracking Is Everything**
Fill spreadsheet DAILY (not "when you remember")  
Update dashboard EVERY FRIDAY  
Make decisions based on DATA (not feelings)
